title: Installing Approved Software from the Software Catalog
text:
Q: How do I install approved software from the software catalog?
A: To install approved software from the software catalog, first, access the company intranet and navigate to the IT section. Look for the 'Software Catalog' link and click on it to view the list of available applications. Once you find the software you need, click on its name to open the details page. From there, you will see an 'Install' button; click it to begin the installation process. Follow any on-screen prompts to complete the installation. If you encounter any issues, please contact the IT helpdesk for assistance.
